modselector.setting.title: MCRider Mod Selector
modselector.preset.1.name: Classic
modselector.preset.1.desc: Shows the default interface implemented with vanilla Minecraft.
modselector.preset.2.name: Semi-Classic
modselector.preset.2.desc: An interface with quality-of-life improvements such as a minimap and drift gauge.
modselector.preset.3.name: MCRider
modselector.preset.3.desc: Shows the original interface unique to KartRider: Minecraft.
modselector.preset.4.name: Original
modselector.preset.4.desc: Recreates the original KartRider's dashboard in pixel-art graphics.
